name: Davide Liga
title: Postdoctoral Researcher in Computer Science
department: Department of Computer Science and Communications
email: davide - dot - liga - at - uni - dot - lu
bio:
*I believe we can harness AI to help humans better understand one another and build a more humane society*  ❤︎ ❤︎ ❤︎
I mostly published in the fields of NLP, AI&Law, and Argument Mining. My research sits at the intersection of **Artificial Intelligence**, **Natural Language Processing**, and **Norms**, with a focus on **Large Language Models** and **Mechanistic Interpretability**.
